reviews.text:
I am so grateful to have worked with Tom and his team! After our original photographer unexpectedly closed her business just two months before our wedding, I reached out to Tom—and from the very first conversation, he was warm, responsive, and incredibly professional. He immediately put us at ease during what could have been a very stressful time.

Working with Tom was an absolute pleasure. He asked thoughtful questions, understood our vision, and made the entire process feel easy and enjoyable. On the wedding day, he was calm, organized, and such a positive presence—helping us stay relaxed while capturing every moment effortlessly.

And the photos… absolutely beautiful. We couldn’t be happier with how everything turned out. Tom captured the spirit, emotion, and joy of the day so perfectly. These are images my husband and I will treasure for a lifetime.

I cannot recommend Tom K Photo highly enough!

We had an amazing experience with Tom! He brought such great energy to our wedding day, which made everything feel natural and fun. He was extremely professional, prompt with all communication, and very organized from start to finish.

He really listened to what we wanted and was so attentive to every detail. And the photos, absolutely beautiful!!! We couldn’t have asked for better.

On top of that, his pricing was incredibly reasonable, but the value we received far exceeded what we paid. Truly worth every penny. Highly recommend!

Tom was/is THE best wedding photographer. I had several family members and friends say that our wedding photos were the best they'd ever seen. He knows how to set up any shot you want, and if you're like us and don't know what you want, he knows exactly how to pose you. Not to mention he's funny and personable and just a joy to work with, I highly recommend using Tom for any photo needs!

We could not have been more happy with Tom and our wedding photos. Tom chatted with us over the phone months before the wedding to help us make sure the timeline of our wedding was going to work well, and he gave us helpful suggestions (since we weren’t working with a wedding planner!) He wanted to know special details of our wedding plans so he knew what to pay specific attention to.  The day-of, he was very professional, fun, and artistic with his shots. He made us feel at ease through the whole process, took wonderful photos, and edited them well. I would absolutely have him as a photographer again in a heartbeat! We will treasure these photos forever 🩷

Finding a great photographer to document our wedding day was one of the highest priorities on our list when we started planning the wedding. We spent a lot of time researching and looking at different photographers, and when we found TomK Photo our decision was made! We loved Tom's style of both capturing traditional poses but also capturing all the emotions and moments of the day. Tom was wonderful to work with. We were planning from out of state, and he brought us so much comfort knowing he was incredibly experienced and had photographed at our venue before.  He was such a calming presence on the day of the wedding. Tom and Jasmyn were very organized. All of my bridesmaids said they had never had photos go so smoothly in any other wedding they had stood up in. He was so fun, captured all the photos and moments we wanted, and was a pleasure to work with. We just received our photos and cannot stop looking at them. Thank you for everything Tom and Jasmyn!
